page_metadata.biotools__summary: MYBS (Mining Yeast Binding Sites) is a tool for mapping Transcription factors (TFs) and their binding sites (TFBSs) that integrates both experimentally verified (ChIP-chip data) and predicted position weight matrixes (PWMs) from several databases.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: MYBS (Mining Yeast Binding Sites) is a tool for mapping Transcription factors (TFs) and their binding sites (TFBSs) that integrates both experimentally verified (ChIP-chip data) and predicted position weight matrixes (PWMs) from several databases.
